macro.title: How much higher can mortgage rates go?
macro.what: Mortgage rates reached 6.75% as the 10-year yield hit 4.68%, with Iran, spreads, and Fed signals driving moves.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage applications fall 2.3% as rates hit upper sixes
macro.what: MBA data show mortgage applications fell 2.3% as the 30-year fixed rate rose to 6.56% and the purchase index dropped 4%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: The housing market is increasingly rewarding functionality over scarcity
macro.what: HousingWire data shows price cuts are helping some markets maintain transaction flow as higher mortgage rates pressure affordability.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Iran Tensions, Not Economic Data, Are Driving Mortgage Rates This Week
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Rates are likely to move more on headlines out of Iran than on economic data
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Wells Fargo mortgage oversight case ends in $110 million settlement
housing.what: Final court approval allows a $110 million Wells Fargo deal, with $100 million for grants and closing cost aid across 50-plus metros.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Maryland overrides municipal zoning on transit development
housing.what: Maryland’s legislative and executive branches are about to tell cities and counties what they can – and cannot – do with parcels of land sitting next to their rail stations
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: MRED cuts Zillow access to Chicagoland listing feed
housing.what: Zillow lost licensed MRED listing data for Zillow and Trulia, about 43,000 active listings, as injunction and arbitration motions proceed.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: ACES report shows mortgage defect rate fell to 1.38% in Q4 2025
housing.what: Mortgage quality control defects declined sharply in the fourth quarter of 2025, even as lenders continued to grapple with a rise in eligibility-related issues tied to affordabilit
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Prices Drops Are Becoming Slightly Less Common As Housing Market Stabilizes
housing.what: The share of home sellers cutting their asking prices has fallen from its peak as buyers lose a bit of negotiating power, but price drops are still much more common than in years past
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: U.S. Home Prices Rose 0.2% in April
housing.what: Improving homebuyer demand could fuel further price gains in the coming months
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: More Than 80% of Prospective Home Sellers Are Interested in a “Coming Soon” Approach to Listing
housing.what: Most homeowners would move if they could–but they feel stuck
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Inside the $150,000 Hamptons Trailer This Couple Turned Into a Dream Home
housing.what: Born and raised in Hampton Bays, NY, Taylor Jayne always imagined she’d build her life in the place that raised her
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: The Price Point: What $400,000 Buys in These Hot U.S. Neighborhoods
housing.what: In this edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re looking at some of the hottest real estate markets in the country, according to Redfin’s latest analysis
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: 110% growth and counting: A Kansas City broker’s GameChanger run
notables.what: According to RealTrends Verified, REMAX State Line + Elite posted $563.2 million in volume across 1,558 transactions in 2025.
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: 2026 GameChanger: Equity Union uses agent-first model to drive 2025 production
notables.what: Equity Union closed 5,670 sides in 2025 and led RealTrends GameChanger rankings, citing agent support and early legal prep.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: The guardrails that decide the outcome of a brokerage sale
notables.what: Selling a real estate brokerage represents years of hard work, risk and dedication
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
